ddls:
CREATE TABLE "pull_requests" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each pull request */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the pull request was created */,
  "closed_at" TEXT /* Date and time the pull request was closed */,
  "merged_at" TEXT /* Date and time the pull request was merged */,
  "state" TEXT /* State of the pull request (e.g., open, closed, merged) */,
  "merged" INTEGER /* Whether the pull request was merged */,
  "repository_id" INTEGER /* ID of the repository */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the pull request */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the pull request */,
  "author_id" INTEGER /* ID of the author of the pull request */,
  "branch" TEXT /* Branch from which the pull request is made */,
  "base_branch" TEXT /* Branch to which the pull request is being merged */,
  "labels" TEXT /* Labels for categorization */,
  "last_updated_at" TEXT /* Last time the pull request was updated */,
  "merge_commit_sha" TEXT /* SHA of the merge commit if the pull request is merged */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pull_requests_author_id FOREIGN KEY ("author_id") REFERENCES users ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pull_requests_repository_id FOREIGN KEY ("repository_id") REFERENCES repositories ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "repositories" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each repository */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the repository */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the repository */,
  "owner" TEXT /* Owner of the repository */,
  "default_branch" TEXT /* Default branch for the repository */,
  "is_private" INTEGER /* Whether the repository is private */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the repository was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Last time the repository was updated */,
  "visibility" TEXT /* Visibility level of the repository (e.g., public, private, internal) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviewers" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each reviewer */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the reviewer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the reviewer */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user account */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Whether the reviewer is currently active */,
  "last_activity_at" TEXT /* Last time the reviewer was active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviewers_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pull_request_reviewers" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each pull request-reviewer pair */,
  "pull_request_id" INTEGER /* ID of the pull request */,
  "reviewer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the reviewer */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the reviewer's involvement (e.g., assigned, reviewed, approved, rejected) */,
  "reviewed_at" TEXT /* Date and time the reviewer completed their review */,
  "approval_status" TEXT /* Whether the reviewer approved the pull request */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pull_request_reviewers_pull_request_id FOREIGN KEY ("pull_request_id") REFERENCES pull_requests ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pull_request_reviewers_reviewer_id FOREIGN KEY ("reviewer_id") REFERENCES reviewers ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "comments" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "pull_request_id" INTEGER /* ID of the pull request */,
  "reviewer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the reviewer */,
  "comment" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the comment was left */,
  "is_resolved" INTEGER /* Whether the comment has been resolved */,
  "line_number" INTEGER /* Line number in the code where the comment was made */,
  "path" TEXT /* File path where the comment was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_pull_request_id FOREIGN KEY ("pull_request_id") REFERENCES pull_requests ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_reviewer_id FOREIGN KEY ("reviewer_id") REFERENCES reviewers ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analytics" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analytics entry */,
  "pull_request_id" INTEGER /* ID of the pull request */,
  "reviewer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the reviewer */,
  "review_time" REAL /* Average review time for the pull request */,
  "merge_rate" REAL /* Merge rate for the pull request */,
  "total_comments" INTEGER /* Total number of comments on the pull request */,
  "total_approvals" INTEGER /* Total number of approvals */,
  "total_rejections" INTEGER /* Total number of rejections */,
  "reviewer_workload" INTEGER /* Number of pull requests the reviewer is currently handling */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytics_reviewer_id FOREIGN KEY ("reviewer_id") REFERENCES reviewers ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytics_pull_request_id FOREIGN KEY ("pull_request_id") REFERENCES pull_requests ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., developer, reviewer, admin) */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Whether the user is currently active */,
  "last_login_at" TEXT /* Last time the user logged in */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions granted to the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Last time the user account was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "pull_request_id" INTEGER /* ID of the pull request */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of notification (e.g., new comment, pull request merged) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the notification was sent */,
  "is_read" INTEGER /* Whether the notification has been read */,
  "read_at" TEXT /* Date and time the notification was read */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_pull_request_id FOREIGN KEY ("pull_request_id") REFERENCES pull_requests ("id")
)
